notes: Session 9 (Opus 4.7, 1M ctx). Added 'Consist Characters' navigation, then introduced a vision model kind end-to-end. Type-system widening: ModelKind = MediaKind | 'vision', JobResult gained optional text + usage; Dexie bumped to v2 adding the personas table { id, name, facial_details, body_shape, user_id?, createdAt, updatedAt } (user_id reserved). New providers/vision/{index.ts,pipelines.ts}: runVision wraps fal.run/openrouter/router/vision via @fal-ai/client (fal.subscribe), uploads Blob/data-URI inputs through fal.storage.upload, maps {output, usage{prompt_tokens,...,cost}} → {text, usage{promptTokens,...,costUsd}}. visionProvider exposes one model 'openrouter/router/vision' with schema (prompt, input_images[], model, system_prompt?, temperature, max_tokens?, reasoning) and exports VISION_MODELS list (gemini-2.5-flash default, claude-sonnet-4.6/4.5, gpt-4o, qwen3-vl-235b, grok-4-fast). useRunJob branches on model.kind === 'vision' to save a single record with media:[] + text + usage. CharactersPage now lists personas (useLiveQuery, hover-delete); PersonaEditor at /characters/{new,:id} has name + two image dropzones (face + body, both optional, ephemeral) + VLM dropdown + Analyze button → analyzePersona() runs face + body prompts in parallel via runVision, fills two editable textareas. New routes registered. StudioPage + TabBar got Eye icon for vision-kind models. Persona-into-image-editor integration: ParamsPanel (when modelKind==='image') gained a Mode dropdown (standard | persona_replacement); persona_replacement reveals a Persona picker (live-loaded via Dexie, links to /characters/new when empty). useRunJob calls applyPersonaToParams() before pipeline dispatch — it rewrites paramsSnapshot.prompt to 'Face: {facial_details} Body: {body_shape} Scene: {prompt}' when mode + persona_id are set; saved record retains mode/persona_id/rewritten prompt. modelKind threaded through GenerationTab → ParamsPanel. tsc clean.
